meaning: n.<美>喜剧演员(或作家),滑稽演员
examples: Arnold didn't mention any funnyman in particular. He didn't have to.
So in one sense, Arnold was right: the funnyman was a national phenomenon.
Nighttime talk show funnyman Jimmy Kimmel hosts Hollywood's glitziest ceremony this year.
Witherspoon will star opposite funnyman Vince Vaughn in New Line's big-budget comedy Four Christmases this winter.
But there is one group that stands to benefit from the funnyman's troubles: the insurance companies.
